title: Astronomy and Space Science Foundations Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: In Astronomy and Space Science, what does "Star" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A luminous sphere of plasma powered by nuclear fusion
wrongAnswers: A natural satellite orbiting a planet or smaller body
The distance light travels in one year
Stretching of light toward longer wavelengths

listOfQuestions.question: In Astronomy and Space Science, what does "Planet" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A large body orbiting a star that clears its orbital neighborhood
wrongAnswers: A rocky small body orbiting the Sun
The curved path of one body around another
A planet orbiting a star outside the Solar System

listOfQuestions.question: In Astronomy and Space Science, what does "Moon" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A natural satellite orbiting a planet or smaller body
wrongAnswers: An icy small body that can form a tail near the Sun
The attraction between masses
A powerful stellar explosion

listOfQuestions.question: In Astronomy and Space Science, what does "Asteroid" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A rocky small body orbiting the Sun
wrongAnswers: A huge system of stars, gas, dust, and dark matter
An instrument that collects and focuses electromagnetic radiation
A region where gravity prevents light from escaping

listOfQuestions.question: In Astronomy and Space Science, what does "Comet" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An icy small body that can form a tail near the Sun
wrongAnswers: A cloud of gas and dust in space
Studying light by separating it into wavelengths
A dense remnant of a massive star

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A huge system of stars, gas, dust, and dark matter
wrongAnswers: The distance light travels in one year
Stretching of light toward longer wavelengths
A dense remnant left by a Sun-like star

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A cloud of gas and dust in space
wrongAnswers: The curved path of one body around another
A planet orbiting a star outside the Solar System
